name: multi-promise
description: Two explicit agent promises with spoken due dates, one caller promise (excluded by default), and small talk. Expect exactly the two agent tasks, both dated.

dialogue.content: Thanks for calling Acme Plumbing, this is Alex. How can I help you today?
Hi Alex, this is Casey. I'm checking on the water heater estimate, and could you send me the updated fee schedule too?
Of course. I'll email you the updated fee schedule tomorrow morning.
Great. What about the paperwork for the install?
I'll send over the service agreement by Friday so you can review it over the weekend.
Perfect. I'll call you back Tuesday after I talk to my partner.
Sounds good. How's that kitchen remodel coming along, by the way?
Slowly! We should grab coffee sometime and catch up.
We should. Talk soon, Casey. Have a great day.

expect.quote_contains: email you the updated fee schedule
send over the service agreement by Friday
